candidate_specs.description: Current adopted package: full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the terminal micro-step only.
Higher-gain unstable reference: same adopted full-vector hard 30 degree cone on the penultimate and terminal micro-steps with the fully live successor increment.
Safe lower-bound reference: replace only the live successor-increment direction with the exact cached direction while keeping the live increment magnitude unchanged.
Current partial-signal reference: 30 degree trust-region toward the cached increment direction while keeping the live increment magnitude unchanged.
Current stronger partial-signal reference: 20 degree trust-region toward the cached increment direction while keeping the live increment magnitude unchanged.
Minimal interaction candidate: 30 degree trust-region toward the cached increment direction with cached increment magnitude.
Stronger minimal interaction candidate: 20 degree trust-region toward the cached increment direction with cached increment magnitude.

increment_direction_magnitude_component_.where_produced: derived from the live preterminal successor value as z_on_next_live - z_on_k_live
increment_direction_magnitude_component_.used_for: preterminal live successor increment under joint direction-magnitude reformulation

increment_direction_magnitude_component_.where_produced: derived from the cached preterminal successor value as z_on_next_cached - z_on_k_cached
increment_direction_magnitude_component_.used_for: cached direction and cached magnitude anchors
direction anchor for the interaction candidates
live-magnitude baseline retained by the safe lower-bound and direction-only references
safer magnitude treatment combined with the trust-region direction in the interaction candidates
